# addNode

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for addNode

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useAddNodeMutation(); mutate({ input: '<AddNodeInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useAddNodeMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useAddNodeMutation();
mutate({ input: '<AddNodeInput>' });
```
